description:
# [2.0.0](https://github.com/BholeyKaBhakt/revanced-patches-xtra/compare/v1.6.0...v2.0.0) (2026-04-26)


### Bug Fixes

* **utils:** fix and update returnEarly() to support various inputs ([0491d25](https://github.com/BholeyKaBhakt/revanced-patches-xtra/commit/0491d259c3099e14fde3278784c6a2c10302c705))


### Features

* **autosync:** update support for v7.5.x+ ([b3568fa](https://github.com/BholeyKaBhakt/revanced-patches-xtra/commit/b3568fa8b354639625abed96d261590fba4462f5))
* migrate from deprecated apis ([21d1b04](https://github.com/BholeyKaBhakt/revanced-patches-xtra/commit/21d1b0446cb3884824d172a6aad250cd3eae0d52))
* revanced -> morphe ([d1be2ef](https://github.com/BholeyKaBhakt/revanced-patches-xtra/commit/d1be2ef4cbf8497ef96a6053ec49e0f72e281164))
* **speedtest:** update support for v7.0+ ([e0c0d01](https://github.com/BholeyKaBhakt/revanced-patches-xtra/commit/e0c0d01f0529d6433efcbb4abc6b81fd10ae91ca))
* **utils:** introduce a logger utility to print matched methods ([bb49dcb](https://github.com/BholeyKaBhakt/revanced-patches-xtra/commit/bb49dcbe3a04a17a85a8fc00227df12199c6f124))


### BREAKING CHANGES

* move to morphe
